The '''Valley of the Lizard Warriors''' was a location on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. The valley was home to the [[Lizard Warrior]] [[Joddar]], and was also the location where the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]], [[Graak (lawbreaker)/Legends|Graak]], was sent after his banishment from [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]].

{{Loc-stub}}
